calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-04-2010 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-15-2010 Reset To May-04-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Guillermo Parra was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Noemi Calonje was placed under oath and served as Spanish speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court requires further information from petitioner in order to proceed with the proposed name change. Good cause appearing, this matter is CONTINUED to May 4, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218.
